message:
feat(storage): tick 146 event-reads cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-fifth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 5 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the event-reads cluster.

New siblings:
- get_unhandled_events_with_cx (read path)
- get_events_stream_with_cx (read path; ID-cursor resume path)
- get_timeline_with_cx (read path; unified cross-pane timeline)
- count_unhandled_events_by_pane_with_cx (read path)
- get_last_activity_by_pane_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick146_event_reads_cluster_roundtrip` seeds a pane
+ event, then exercises all 5 reads. Proves seeded event surfaces
in `get_unhandled_events_with_cx`, `get_events_stream_with_cx`, and
the unhandled-count map (pane 41 → 1). `get_timeline_with_cx` and
`get_last_activity_by_pane_with_cx` just need to roundtrip since
they draw on data not seeded here (correlations, segments).
Verified via fork bypass: 493/493 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 115 + 5 = 120 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 20 legacy methods still lack a sibling; event-reads
cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
